TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_No_to'as_a_lekakawa, title = No_to'as_a_lekakawa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/No_to'as_a_lekakawa} }

S.FORM: anini misatapang to kako a mitilid to pakayni'ay i lekakawa no to'as no Amis.
S.PHON: anini misatapaŋ to~u kako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniʡaj i ɾəkakawa no~u to~uʡas no~u amis.
S.FORM: anini misatapang to kako a mitilid to pakayni'ay i lekakawa no to'as no Amis.
S.PHON: anini misatapaŋ to~u kako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u pakajniʡaj i ɾəkakawa no~u to~uʡas no~u amis.
